channel.title: Edge-Computing on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Edge-Computing on Systology

item.title: Payment System
item.description: A high-integrity architecture for global payment gateways and internal ledgers, emphasizing rigorous idempotency, eventual consistency, and deterministic recovery.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.

item.title: Privacy & Agents
item.description: Privacy-first design rules for autonomous AI agents; establishing local-first execution defaults, strict data minimization and redaction, explicit user consent flows, and transparent, auditable action logs.
